basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Young Professional-I (YP-I) Notification 2026 has been released on 24 June 2026 on the official website iari.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR IARI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: As per GOI/ICAR rules

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. in Horticulture, Agriculture, or B.Sc. in Botany / Forestry / Life Sciences from a recognized university
qualification.details: B.Sc. in Horticulture, Agriculture, or B.Sc. in Botany / Forestry / Life Sciences from a recognized university

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ICAR IARI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ICAR IARI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR IARI Young Professional-I (YP-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICAR IARI Young Professional-I (YP-I) posts is 14th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree in Horticulture, Agriculture, or B.Sc. in Botany / Forestry / Life Sciences from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ICAR IARI Young Professional-I (YP-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years and the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ICAR IARI Young Professional-I (YP-I) posts?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line is correctly mentioned.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute located?
faq.answer: The ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110012.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job.
